assertions.reason: `slop-code run` produced a run directory that `slop-code eval --overwrite` accepted (exit 0). Eval artifacts include pass-rate and erosion fields per checkpoint, and a verbosity section in result.json schema.
Two-agent runner exited non-zero with 'no checkpoints found' for dag_execution, and no output directory was created for eval. `slop-code eval` then failed with invalid AGENT_RUN_DIR.
Checkpoint listings differ between baseline and two-agent outputs (baseline had checkpoint_1, two-agent had none).
Dolt `scbench` database does not contain the `experiments` table in this environment, so insertion behavior cannot be validated through the user surface.
Dolt `budget` table is missing, so before/after spent and remaining deltas cannot be measured.
Budget-gate path is not testable in this environment because required Dolt budget table is absent and `pymysql` dependency is unavailable for the pipeline's Dolt connector.

commandsRun.command: cd /home/ubuntu/git-repos/slop-code-bench && uv run slop-code run --agent claude_code --model nvidia/nvidia-bedrock-claude-haiku-4-5 --problem dag_execution --evaluate --no-live-progress agent.cost_limits.cost_limit=0.20 save_dir=/tmp/scbench-user-testing/pipeline-part1/baseline_run save_template=.
commandsRun.observation: Run directory created; checkpoint_1 evaluated; agent errored and later checkpoints missing; summary and checkpoint_results.jsonl written.
Eval accepted baseline run directory and regenerated report artifacts.

commandsRun.command: cd /home/ubuntu/git-repos/slop-code-bench && uv run python research/runner/two_agent_runner.py --problem dag_execution --model nvidia-bedrock-claude-haiku-4-5 --budget 0.20 --budget-split 70 --output-dir /tmp/scbench-user-testing/pipeline-part1/VAL-PIPELINE-002-two-agent-run
commandsRun.observation: Runner failed immediately with 'no checkpoints found' in problem directory.
Eval failed because two-agent run directory did not exist.

commandsRun.command: python3 checkpoint listing diff script for baseline vs two-agent outputs

commandsRun.observation: Databases present: hq, information_schema, mysql, scbench.
Only Gas Town issue-tracking tables present; no experiments or budget tables.

frictions.description: `slop-code eval` returned non-zero when run without `--overwrite` because the run had already been evaluated once.
frictions.resolution: Re-ran with `--overwrite` to force evaluation and collect deterministic evidence.

blockers.description: Dolt research tables required by pipeline assertions (`experiments`, `budget`) are not present in scbench/hq databases.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Checked available databases and table listings in both scbench and hq via dolt sql; confirmed tables are absent.

blockers.description: `pymysql` dependency for experiment_pipeline Dolt connector is not installed.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Verified import directly with `uv run python -c "import pymysql"`; import fails with ModuleNotFoundError.

summary: Validated VAL-PIPELINE-001..006 via shell CLI. 1 passed (001), 2 failed (002,003), and 3 blocked by missing Dolt research schema/dependency (004,005,006). Evidence files were saved under mission evidence/foundation/pipeline-part1/.
